verses.text: A mighty angel clothed with a cloud, a rainbow on his head, face as the sun, set his feet on sea and land and 'cried with a loud voice.' Mighty herald. A glorious angel descends with a cry.
A mighty angel clothed with a cloud, a rainbow on his head, face as the sun, set his feet on sea and land and 'cried with a loud voice.' Mighty herald. A glorious angel descends with a cry.
A mighty angel clothed with a cloud, a rainbow on his head, face as the sun, set his feet on sea and land and 'cried with a loud voice.' Mighty herald. A glorious angel descends with a cry.
Seven thunders uttered, but John is told 'Seal up those things... and write them not.' Then the angel lifts his hand to heaven. Sealed words. Some things God keeps hidden.
Seven thunders uttered, but John is told 'Seal up those things... and write them not.' Then the angel lifts his hand to heaven. Sealed words. Some things God keeps hidden.
He swears 'that there should be time no longer,' but at the seventh trumpet 'the mystery of God should be finished.' No more delay. God's purpose will soon be complete.
He swears 'that there should be time no longer,' but at the seventh trumpet 'the mystery of God should be finished.' No more delay. God's purpose will soon be complete.
John is bid eat the little book; 'in thy mouth sweet as honey,' but bitter in the belly; he must 'prophesy again.' Sweet and bitter. God's word is sweet to receive, hard to bear.
